grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers 12 comprehensive practice areas including governance, client care, training, file management, and cyber security

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Extensively details specific evidence types including training records, complaints register, CQS application details, AML policies, etc.

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) and CQS Compliance Officer roles in governance section

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Covers lender panel compliance and UK Finance Mortgage Lenders' Handbook monitoring requirements

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section on fraud and cyber risk controls with specific procedures for preventing payment diversion and CEO fraud

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Separate sections covering both file management (end-to-end process) and supervision/competence requirements
